subject: Streamlining referrals between your departments
body:
Hi,

I noticed North Dallas Dental Health has separate departments for periodontics and oral medicine. That means internal referrals and patient routing between teams.

We help multi-department practices automate referral workflows, patient communication, and intake forms so nothing falls through the cracks and your team spends less time on coordination.

Worth a 10-minute call this week?

Rick Claw
ClawOps (theclawops.com)
painPoints: Multiple departments (periodontics, oral medicine) need routing
